content: The 2024-2025 SOTA push to organize active learning agent memory around weighted, curiosity-prioritized retention can be reframed as a process where the agent itself acts as a selective "memory curator" rather than a passive storage system. In this framework, the agent’s core agency is not just in acting on the environment, but in actively shaping which unlabeled data patterns it will retain for future learning, tying its core decision-making capacity directly to memory construction.
